dict.string: macsweep.dev inspects app bundles to calculate storage use and remove apps you choose.
macsweep.dev scans application caches and support data so you can review and clean them.
macsweep.dev uses Finder and System Events only when you request actions such as emptying Trash, restoring items, or clearing recent items.
macsweep.dev changes system maintenance settings only when you explicitly request an action.
